top_complaints.description: users are unhappy with the high cost of the app, feeling that the features do not justify the price
users are frustrated with the complexity and clunkiness of the app, finding it difficult to use
users are unhappy with the lack of response from customer support, feeling that their issues are being ignored

top_delights.description: users love the ability to keep all their notes and information organized in one place
users appreciate the seamless syncing across devices, allowing them to access their notes from anywhere
users enjoy the variety of features, such as audio and image note-taking, and the ability to share notes

feature_backlog.reason: users want a more transparent and affordable pricing plan
users want a more intuitive and user-friendly interface
users want faster and more responsive customer support
users want more storage space to accommodate their growing note collections
users want to be able to integrate Evernote with other apps and services

ninety_day_action_plan.focus: Simplifying Pricing and Improving User Experience
actions: Conduct user surveys to understand pricing expectations
Simplify the pricing plan and communicate changes to users
Begin redesigning the user interface to improve usability

ninety_day_action_plan.focus: Enhancing Customer Support and Adding New Features
actions: Hire additional customer support staff to improve response times
Develop and release new features, such as increased storage and integration with other apps
Begin testing and refining the new user interface

ninety_day_action_plan.focus: Launching New Features and Promoting the App
actions: Launch the new user interface and simplified pricing plan
Promote the app through social media and targeted advertising
Continue to gather user feedback and make improvements to the app

acquisition_verdict: Evernote has a loyal user base, but its high pricing and complex user experience are driving users away, making it essential to simplify the pricing plan and improve the user interface to remain competitive.
